calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Continued To Sep-19-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Scott Peebles, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's witness: Kim Reeder, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Tracy Hector.
Exhibit 1 - Fourteen-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1016 Connecticut St., San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $488.80
Costs $175.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ATTORNEY PEEBLES FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TRACY HECTOR

SETTLEMENT CONFERERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
